fields.summary: SharingPolicy enhancements required to support recurring reservations in ReservationSystem
Support for recurring reservations in the YARN ReservationSystem

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: YARN-5326 proposes adding native support for recurring reservations in the YARN ReservationSystem. This JIRA is a sub-task to track the changes required in SharingPolicy to accomplish it. Please refer to the design doc in the parent JIRA for details.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Plan/ResourceAllocation data structure enhancements required to support recurring reservations in ReservationSystem

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

fields.summary: Placement Agent enhancements required to support recurring reservations in ReservationSystem

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

comments.body:
(patch depends on YARN-5328, hence the issues). 

The patch makes small updates to the policies, and completely reworks the test infrastructure, moved to parametrized, and broadly increased coverage.

Thanks [~curino] for the patch. It looks good except for couple of nits:
* Can you remove the commented code in {{CapacityOverTimePolicy}} as now we handle periodicity in {{RLESparseResourceAllocation}} transparently.
* Fix the remaining checkstyle warnings.

BTW I really like the {{BaseSharingPolicyTest}} refactoring.

Thanks @subru for feedback, I have address your comments (and I think checkstyle). 

Re: {{BaseSharingPolicyTest}}... thanks :-)

Thanks [~curino] for the patch. It looks good except for couple of nits:

* Fix the remaining checkstyle warnings.

BTW I really like the {{BaseSharingPolicyTest}} refactoring.

Thanks @subru for feedback, I have address your comments (and I think checkstyle). 

Re: {{BaseSharingPolicyTest}}... thanks :-)
